heroDescription: We design with purpose and craft with care. Meet the people who bring Sampada's heritage, design, and quality to life.
teamIntro: Sampada is built on craft, culture, and care. From design to delivery, our team blends traditional techniques with modern sensibility to create pieces that carry meaning.

leadership.name: Aarav Mehta
leadership.bio: Visionary behind Sampada's aesthetic; leads design direction and cultural collaborations.

leadership.name: Nisha Rao
leadership.bio: Oversees product strategy, quality, and seasonal collections.

leadership.name: Rohan Kapoor
leadership.bio: Ensures ethical sourcing and timely delivery; manages production partnerships.

leadership.name: Maya Iyer
leadership.bio: Crafts Sampada's voice and campaigns; leads content and community partnerships.

cultureDescription: We celebrate craft, curiosity, and community through workshops, residencies, and pop-ups. Our team values collaboration, continuous learning, and creative expression.

benefits.title: Maker Time
benefits.description: Paid studio hours for personal creative projects.

benefits.title: Flexible Work
benefits.description: Hybrid work options and flexible hours.

benefits.title: Team Retreats
benefits.description: Annual team building and cultural immersion trips.

careersCTADescription: If you care about craft, culture, and sustainable design, bring your curiosity and skills to Sampada.

seo.metaTitle: Sampada Team — Meet Our Designers and Makers
seo.metaDescription: Meet the Sampada team behind heritage-inspired design and ethical production. Learn about our leadership, departments, culture, and open roles.
